name: Naturia White Oak
name_jp: ナチュル・ホワイトオーク
desc: When your opponent activates a card or effect that targets this card (Quick Effect): You can send this card from the field to the GY; Special Summon 2 Level 4 or lower "Naturia" monsters from your Deck, but they cannot declare an attack, also destroy them during your End Phase.
mnst_eff: When your opponent activates a card or effect that targets this card (Quick Effect): You can send this card from the field to the GY; Special Summon 2 Level 4 or lower "Naturia" monsters from your Deck, but they cannot declare an attack, also destroy them during your End Phase.
eff: When your opponent activates a card or effect that targets this card (Quick Effect): You can send this card from the field to the GY; Special Summon 2 Level 4 or lower "Naturia" monsters from your Deck, but they cannot declare an attack, also destroy them during your End Phase.
